YUM-KILL.title: Kill
YUM-THE_SQUAD.title: The squad
YUM-THE_SQUAD.description: Everyone [gold]Forges[/gold] 1 whenever anyone hits an enemy.
YUM-DEMON_BLOOD.title: Demon blood
YUM-DEMON_BLOOD.description:
Every player gains
[gold]The call of blood[/gold].
YUM-THE_CALL_OF_BLOOD.title: The call of blood
YUM-THE_CALL_OF_BLOOD.description: On every hit to an enemy gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold]. Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP at the start of your turn.
YUM-PUNISHING_HAND.title: Punishing hand
YUM-PUNISHING_HAND.description: [gold]Forge[/gold] {Forge:diff()}. [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] is played if it is on top of [gold]draw pile[/gold] at the end of turn.
YUM-GLIMPSE_FROM_ABOVE.title: Glimpse from above
YUM-GLIMPSE_FROM_ABOVE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Put 1 card from your [gold]Hand[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
At the start of your next turn, draw [blue]1[/blue] additional card.
YUM-GLIMPSE_FROM_ABOVE.selectionScreenPr: Choose a card to put on top of your Draw Pile.
YUM-HEAVY_WOUNDS.title: Heavy wounds
YUM-HEAVY_WOUNDS.description: [gold]Forge[/gold] {Forge:diff()}. Enemies hit by [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] receive {DamageIncrease:diff()}% more damage from attacks for 2 turns.
YUM-DEATH_INTENTION.title: Death intention
YUM-DEATH_INTENTION.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a chosen [gold]Power[/gold] card. Create [gold]Death's echo[/gold], costing 1 more than the exhausted card.
YUM-DEATH_INTENTION.selectionScreenPromp: Choose a Power card to exhaust.
YUM-DEATH_INTENTION_TOKEN.title: Death's echo
YUM-DEATH_INTENTION_TOKEN.description: Add a copy of [gold]{CardName}[/gold] to the Hand of all other players. The copies are free and [gold]Ethereal[/gold].
